title: 500g Pink Shredded Tissue Paper for Gift Boxes & Hampers, Soft Hamper Filling and Packaging Filler, Shreds Stuffing Paper Suitable Party Baby Shower Graduation Housewarming ect
features: 500g Shredded Tissue Paper: This shredded paper comes in a variety of eye-catching colours. It adds vibrant colour to packaging, provides protective cushioning, makes for a stunning presentation and creates a premium unboxing experience for any type of packaging.

Superior Quality: Our shredded pink tissue paper from outstanding paper. Crafted crushed, soft to the touch. Eco-friendly, recyclable, biodegradable, non-toxic, odourless, safe for pets and people. A favorite among crafters, retailers, and small businesses alike.

Perfect for Filling& Wrapping: Our pink shredded packaging filler offers a multitude of uses that make it a must have. 500g pink shredded paper is enough to stuffing loads of gift bags, gift boxes, gift baskets, easter baskets, hampers, packaging, and wrapping. Whether for daily use or special occasions, it's the perfect choice to add that extra something to your creations.

Occasions: Whether for anniversaries, weddings, birthdays or other parties, or for Valentine's Day, Mother's Day, Father's Day, Easter, Christmas and all other festivals. Our shredded paper fillers are perfect for your gift giving.

Tips for Use: As AGOBUHE shredded tissue paper was compressed during transport, please rub it gently to make it more fluffy before use. Keep away from children, fire and water to avoid accidental ingestion, fire and damage to the product.
